contentBlocks.original:
शारदा शारदांभोज वदना वदनांबुजे ।
सर्वदा सर्वदास्माकं सन्निधिःसन्निधिं कुरु ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śāradā śāradāṃbhoja vadanā vadanāṃbuje .
sarvadā sarvadāsmākaṃ sannidhiḥsannidhiṃ kuru ..
contentBlocks.translation: Sharada, with a face like the lotus of the sharad season (winter), with two eyes, like the lotuses, on the face, forever O bestower of all things bless us with prosperity and your proximity.
contentBlocks.meanings: शारदा (śāradā) – Sharada; शारदांभोज (śāradāmbhoja) – lotus of the sharad season (śārada:sharad season | ambhoja:lotus); वदना (vadanā) – face; वदनांबुजे (vadanāmbuje) – lotuses on the face (vadana:face | ambuje:lotuses); सर्वदा (sarvadā) – always; सर्वदा (sarvadā) – always; अस्माकं (asmākaṃ) – our; सन्निधिः (sannidhiḥ) – proximity; सन्निधिं (sannidhiṃ) – proximity; कुरु (kuru) – do;
